criteria.name: AI Feature Variety
criteria.description: The breadth of AI functionalities offered (e.g., music generation, style transfer, mastering, accompaniment).
criteria.sources: App descriptions, reviews, and expert opinions.

criteria.name: User Rating
criteria.description: Average user rating from app stores.
criteria.sources: App stores (e.g., Google Play Store, Apple App Store).

criteria.name: Number of Downloads/Installs
criteria.description: Popularity and adoption rate of the app.
criteria.sources: App stores (e.g., Google Play Store, Apple App Store).

criteria.name: Ease of Use
criteria.description: How intuitive and user-friendly the app interface is.
criteria.sources: User reviews, expert reviews, and personal experience.

criteria.name: Sound Quality
criteria.description: Perceived quality of the output music/audio.
criteria.sources: User reviews, expert reviews, and personal experience.

criteria.name: Customization Options
criteria.description: The degree to which users can personalize the AI's output.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, reviews, and expert opinions.
